Oracle Events
OE 1 : Search emails for Chloe's rate increase email to Marcus
Use search_emails (query: "Heartland rate increase" or "Chloe Marcus rate" or "rate proposal"). Find email ID 22588b73137146a6a5118a4eaffa48b0 where Chloe expressed urgent concern about Heartland's 15% rate increase the first error, as Jake's formal notice to Marcus stated 20% across all service tiers. Chloe quoted 15% before Jake's reply lowered the rate to 15% as a final position, meaning her initial figure was unsourced and premature at the time she sent it.
OE 2 : Search emails for Jake Loomis's original rate increase notice to Marcus
Use search_emails (query: "Jake Loomis" or "Heartland rate increase 20%" or "HM-2026-Q1-0042 rate"). Find Jake's formal rate increase notice to Marcus dated April 13 establishing the correct figure of 20% across all service tiers effective Q3 2026 the authoritative source to verify against Chloe's communications.
OE 3 : Search emails for Chloe's billing request to Hana
Use search_emails (query: "Hana billing discrepancies" or "Heartland billing" or "storage charge" or "Q1 moves"). Find email ID 0091930b6d97471d85c8a2f0be9fd6be where Chloe asked Hana to confirm that Heartland charged for 10 days of storage the second error, as the actual unauthorized charge was 2 days of storage.
OE 4 : Search emails for Hana's confirmation reply to Chloe
Use search_emails (query: "Hana Chloe billing confirmation" or "3 of 5 Q1" or "billing discrepancies confirmed"). Find email ID 28699a9f9e3f42f08e81f60ec715c2d9 where Hana confirmed 3 of the 5 Q1 Heartland moves contain billing discrepancies establishing the correct scope of the problem.
OE 5 : Search emails for Chloe's billing findings email to Marcus
Use search_emails (query: "Alejandro Heartland" or "billing discrepancies Marcus" or "all Q1 moves" or "storage 10 days"). Find email ID 9b95f4488b36487db892f961d6b8cc9d where Chloe made three errors simultaneously: attributed the findings to Alejandro Fuentes instead of Hana Kim, claimed all Q1 moves had discrepancies instead of 3 of 5, and stated 10 days of unauthorized storage instead of 2 days.
OE 6 : Search emails for Chloe's email to Jake Loomis
Use search_emails (query: "Jake Loomis billing" or "Chloe Jake" or "all five Q1 moves" or "storage charge Jake"). Find email ID ea11b6b19b4643cd980d28979a867257 where Chloe told Jake that all five Q1 moves had billing discrepancies and that Heartland charged for 10 days of unauthorized storage repeating both errors from OE 5.
OE 7 : Search emails for Jake Loomis's final position reply
Use search_emails (query: "Jake final position" or "15% final" or "Heartland final proposal" or "relay to Marcus"). Find email ID ac04ba0a3557445e87c9cbb81bac42db where Jake acknowledged the billing concerns, lowered the rate increase from 20% to 15% as a final position, and explicitly asked Chloe to relay this to Marcus immediately.
OE 8 : Check whether Chloe forwarded Jake's final position to Marcus
Use search_emails (query: "Jake final 15%" or "Heartland final proposal Marcus" or "relay Heartland" or "15% final position Marcus"). Determine whether Chloe ever forwarded Jake's final 15% proposal to Marcus the agent should find no such email exists, establishing the fifth mistake.
OE 9 : Search Slack for Chloe's Lakeline Logistics reply and check for any decision
Use conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Lakeline Logistics" or "Sandra Walsh" or "1% below" or "Midwest Southeast"). Find Chloe's reply (timestamp: 1775426033.163189) where she described Lakeline's rates as roughly 1% below MoveOps' current Heartland pricing the sixth error, as the correct figure is 10% below per Sandra Walsh's email. Also search email and Slack for any Marcus or Elena decision about switching to Lakeline the agent should find no such decision has been made in either channel.
OE 10 : Search emails for Sandra Walsh's Lakeline rate quote
Use search_emails (query: "Sandra Walsh" or "Lakeline capacity" or "Lakeline pricing" or "Q3 corporate relocation capacity"). Find email ID email_email_4c8116551604 from sandra.walsh@lakeline-logistics.com to chloe.vance@moveops.com where Sandra states Lakeline can come in at roughly 10% below the pricing MoveOps is currently seeing from Heartland the authoritative source to verify against Chloe's erroneous 1% Slack claim.
OE 11 : Search emails for DOT compliance audit results
Use search_emails (query: "DOT audit" or "hazmat audit" or "placarding certificate" or "Keiko Tanaka"). Find Chloe's email to Greg Pallone at Swift (CC: Marcus Thorne) dated April 21 with the hazmat shipment audit results and the request for Swift to provide Keiko Tanaka's missing signed DOT placarding certificate for the Columbus-to-Seattle laser cutter shipment.
OE 12 : Search emails for Swift's response on Keiko Tanaka's placarding certificate
Use search_emails (query: "Swift placarding certificate" or "Keiko Tanaka certificate" or "Greg Pallone placarding"). Find whether Greg Pallone at Swift confirmed and actually sent the placarding certificate for Keiko Tanaka's move.
OE 13 : Search Airtable for Keiko Tanaka's relocation record
Use airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Keiko Tanaka"). Confirm the DOT placarding requirement is documented in the relocation record (recKeikoTanakaColumbusSeattle) and check the current status (In Progress). The Special Requirements field notes the Class 3B CO2 laser tube requiring DOT 49 CFR Part 173 hazmat placarding, the $800 hazmat handling surcharge, and the 8-day interim storage gap between Columbus and Seattle leases.
OE 14 : Search calendar for April 24 DOT hazmat training
Use calendar_search_events (query: "DOT hazmat training" or "hazmat training April 24" or "compliance training"). Find the DOT hazmat training scheduled for April 24 at 2:00 PM Pacific and confirm it is still on the calendar with attendees confirmed.
OE 15 : Search emails for Dr. Mehta executive relocation status
Use search_emails (query: "Dr. Mehta" or "Anand Mehta" or "Canopy Health relocation" or "Fatimah Mehta"). Find the current status of the three workstreams ,Temporary Housing (Chicago River North), Equipment Packing & Chain-of-Custody (Medical Research Equipment), and Main Household Move (Boston to Chicago) and whether Fatimah has flagged any issues.
OE 16 : Search CRM deals for Dr. Mehta's relocation deal
Use crm_search_deals (dealname: "Mehta" or "Canopy Health") or first use crm_search_companies (name: "Canopy Health") to get company_id "company_canopy", then crm_search_deals (company_id: "company_canopy"). Find the CRM deal (deal ID crm_deal_c7ed21dc7fdb, "Canopy Health Dr. Anand Mehta Executive Relocation (Boston to Chicago, May 2026)", amount $12,170, stage in-progress) and confirm the relocation is properly tracked with coordinator Fatimah Al-Rashidi and a May 5 target on-site date.
OE 17 : Search Linear for Dr. Mehta relocation tracking tickets
Use linear_list_issues (query: "Dr. Mehta" or "Canopy Health" or "executive relocation" or "Mehta"). Find whether tickets exist tracking the three workstreams and whether any are flagged as blocked or behind.
OE 18 : Search emails for Marcus Webb cold-chain split-vendor coordination
Use search_emails (query: "Marcus Webb" or "cold-chain" or "lab equipment" or "split vendor" or "Swift Heartland Webb"). Find the coordination emails establishing that Swift Relocations is handling the cold-chain lab equipment freight and confirm vendor notification Swift was notified via email (Blessing Okafor's cold-chain freight inquiry), while Heartland's acknowledgment of their household-goods-only role was confirmed via phone per CRM engagement record.
OE 19 : Search Airtable for Marcus Webb's relocation record
Use airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Marcus Webb"). Confirm the split-vendor arrangement is properly documented in the relocation record (recMarcusWebbDetroitChicago) and that Swift's role for the cold-chain equipment is formally noted in the Special Requirements field.
OE 20 : Look up Marcus Thorne's and Jake Loomis's contacts
Use contacts_search_contacts (query: "Marcus Thorne") to get marcus.thorne@moveops.com. Use contacts_search_contacts (query: "Jake Loomis" or "Heartland") to get Jake Loomis's email at Heartland Movers.
OE 21 : Send corrected email to Marcus about the rate increase percentage
Use send_email (sender: "chloe.vance@moveops.com", recipients: ["marcus.thorne@moveops.com"]). Subject referencing Heartland rate increase correction. Body must: clarify that Jake Loomis's formal notice to Marcus dated April 13 stated a 20% rate increase across all service tiers, that Chloe's earlier email incorrectly quoted 15% without sourcing it from Jake's formal communication, and that Jake has since lowered the rate to 15% as Heartland's final position (per his reply to Chloe).
OE 22 : Send corrected email to Marcus about the billing findings
Use send_email (sender: "chloe.vance@moveops.com", recipients: ["marcus.thorne@moveops.com"]). Subject referencing billing discrepancy correction. Body must: correct the source from Alejandro Fuentes to Hana Kim, correct the scope from all Q1 moves to 3 of 5 Q1 moves, and correct the unauthorized storage charge from 10 days to 2 days.
OE 23 : Send corrected email to Jake Loomis about the billing discrepancies
Use send_email (sender: "chloe.vance@moveops.com", recipients: ["jake.loomis@heartlandmovers.com"]). Subject referencing billing discrepancy correction. Body must: correct the scope from all five Q1 moves to 3 of 5 Q1 moves, and correct the unauthorized storage charge from 10 days to 2 days.
OE 24 : Forward Jake's final 15% position to Marcus
Use send_email (sender: "chloe.vance@moveops.com", recipients: ["marcus.thorne@moveops.com"]). Subject referencing Heartland's final rate position. Body must: relay Jake's final proposal of 15% rate increase, note this was lowered from the original 20% out of respect for the partnership, and flag that Jake requested this be relayed to Marcus immediately as Heartland's final position.
OE 25 : Post corrected Slack message in #operations about Lakeline rates
Use conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C006", thread_ts: "1775425907.252580") in the #operations channel thread (the root of the thread containing Chloe's erroneous reply at ts 1775426033.163189). Message must: correct Lakeline Logistics' rate advantage from approximately 1% below current Heartland pricing to the accurate 10% below current Heartland pricing.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

📋 Rubrics
Rubric Results
✓ Pass ✗ Fail Click any row to expand justifications
# Criterion Run #1Run #2Run #3Run #4Run #5Run #6 Pass Rate
1 An email was sent (via `send_email`) to `marcus.thorne@moveops.com` correcting the Heartland rate increase percentage.
outcome
 ✗✗✗✗✗✗ 0%
✗Run #1The agent never searched for Jake Loomis's formal Heartland rate increase notice or identified that Chloe misquoted the rate increase percentage. No email was sent to marcus.thorne@moveops.com correcting a Heartland rate increase figure. The only correction email the agent sent to Marcus was about the Lakeline pricing (1% vs 10%).
✗Run #2The agent sent an email to marcus.thorne@moveops.com, but it only corrected the Lakeline Logistics rate (1% → 10%), not the Heartland rate increase percentage (15% vs. 20%). No email was sent correcting the Heartland rate increase figure.
✗Run #3The agent never sent an email to marcus.thorne@moveops.com correcting a Heartland rate increase percentage. The agent did not identify or act on the 15% vs 20% rate increase discrepancy at all. No send_email tool call was made to Marcus about this.

23 The model must pass a query related to "Jake Loomis" or "Heartland rate increase" or "20%" or "Q3 2026" (or similar) when calling `search_emails` to find Jake's original rate increase notice.
query construction
 ✗✗✗✗✗✗ 0%
✗Run #1The agent never searched for 'Jake Loomis', 'Heartland rate increase', '20%', or 'Q3 2026' in email searches. Without finding Jake's formal notice, the agent could not identify that Chloe's 15% figure was incorrect relative to the 20% formal notice.
✗Run #2The agent's search_emails calls used queries: 'Chloe Vance', 'Lakeline', 'Keiko Tanaka', 'Dr. Mehta', 'cold-chain', 'placarding certificate', and 'Swift placarding PDF'. None targeted 'Jake Loomis', 'Heartland rate increase', '20%', or 'Q3 2026', meaning Jake's original rate notice was never specifically sought.
✗Run #3The agent never searched emails with queries related to 'Jake Loomis', 'Heartland rate increase', '20%', or 'Q3 2026'. The agent's email searches used queries like 'Chloe', 'Chloe Vance', 'Lakeline', 'Marcus Webb', 'cryogenic', and 'placarding certificate', but none targeted Jake Loomis's rate increase notice.
✗Run #4The agent never searched for 'Jake Loomis', 'Heartland rate increase', '20%', 'Q3 2026', or any similar query in search_emails. All email searches were for 'Chloe Vance', 'Lakeline', 'Keiko Tanaka', 'Mehta', 'cold-chain', 'Marcus Webb', 'Swift placarding PDF', and 'placarding certificate PDF'.
✗Run #5The agent never searched for 'Jake Loomis', 'Heartland rate increase', '20%', or 'Q3 2026' in search_emails. Without finding Jake's original rate increase notice, the 20% vs. 15% discrepancy could not be identified, and indeed the agent did not flag this error.
